title: nepeta ucranica subsp. hispanica
intro: Nepeta ucranica subsp. hispanica, also known as Spanish catmint, is a subspecies of the Nepeta ucranica plant, a type of perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Spanish catmint include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a good night's sleep. Spanish catmint can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in cooking and as a natural remedy for various ailments.
